title: Tutorial screen to QSG screen
scenario: Verify that navigating from Tutorial to QSG tab displays the correct start QSG page with image and text matching Figma design.
steps: Observe the start QSG page that opens.
Check that the displayed image matches the Figma design.
Check that the displayed text matches the Figma design.
expected: The start QSG page opens with the correct image and text, matching the Figma design.
